failedAssertions.reason: Pre-commit hooks only run eslint --fix and prettier --write via lint-staged. Typecheck (tsc --noEmit) is not included. The assertion requires both lint AND typecheck to run on staged files during commit. A separate bun run typecheck step should be added to .husky/pre-commit or lint-staged should be configured to include it.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: CLI/Terminal section with isolation rules, pre-started services info, and verification instructions for scaffold assertions
